intent_head: Whose birthday is coming up next? If multiple people share that next birthday date, list all of them. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system per root rule, and used canonical cast records as authoritative for birthdays.
function.outcome_justification: Context provided today as 2026-03-23. Canonical birthday search in 10_entities/cast identified 03-26 as the nearest upcoming birthday, and reading 10_entities/cast/lukas.md confirms the exact name Lukas Brenner. A follow-up cast search for 03-26 found no additional birthday entries on that date.
